name: 易经·占卜
short_description: This divination simulator, grounded in the ancient I Ching principles, offers traditional Chinese "Numerical" and "Hexagram Divination" methods. With an AI feature, it answers queries on both ancient metaphysics and modern topics like astrology and MBTI, catering to diverse mystical interests
detailed_description: This is a divination simulator created using the principles of the ancient Chinese I Ching, a method of divination with a history of 5000 years in China. It enables the use of two ancient and mystical Chinese methods of divination: "Numerical Divination" and "Hexagram Divination," to obtain an auspicious, inauspicious, or neutral outcome for inquiries held in mind. Additionally, we have integrated an AI fortune-telling feature, allowing you to ask questions related to ancient Chinese metaphysics such as "Bazi" and "I Ching," or modern metaphysical subjects like "astrology" and "MBTI," among any other metaphysical topics you're interested in. The AI master will provide detailed answers to each of your questions.
